name: Lifestyle Communities Limited
analysis: LIC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$5.3500. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.5100, stop A$4.7421, target A$6.1600 (0.85:1) — then trail it.
